# Tasks: Composable Credit OS — Full Platform

**Product**: Composable Credit OS (`credit-os`)
**Branch**: `feature/credit-os/platform`
**Created**: 2026-05-17
**Plan**: [plan.md](./plan.md)
**Spec**: [specs/spec.md](./specs/spec.md)
**Generated by**: `/speckit.tasks` (QA Engineer)

## Format

`- [ ] [TaskID] [P?] [Story?] Description → file/path`

- **TaskID**: T001, T002, etc.
- **[P]**: Can run in parallel with other [P] tasks in the same phase (no shared file, no dependency)
- **[Story]**: Links to a user story (e.g., [US-01]) and/or FR IDs implemented
- **→ file/path**: Primary target file to create/modify

Each detailed task below also carries an explicit metadata block: **Agent**, **Depends_on**, **Implements**, **Acceptance**, **Parallel_ok**.

## Decomposition Depth Note

Per the task brief, **Phase 0 (Setup/Scaffold)** and **Phase 1 (Foundation — Metadata Repository, Data Dictionary, Audit, Security & Ownership)** are decomposed into fine-grained, individually-executable tasks (T001–T088). **Phases 2–5** are kept at epic/story-level granularity (T100–T255) and MUST be re-decomposed with a follow-up `/speckit.tasks` run before each phase begins implementation. This matches plan.md, which states only Phases 1–2 are detailed "to task-generation depth" — Phase 2 is included here at story level because its design is complete; Phases 3–5 give the design approach only.

---

## Pre-verified Exclusions (already implemented)

*From the Implementation Audit in plan.md — these capabilities are NOT included as tasks. They are imported as-is from shared packages.*

| Capability | Evidence | Spec Req | Would Have Been |
|-----------|----------|----------|-----------------|
| Structured logging w/ PII redaction | `@connectsw/shared/utils/logger` | NFR-005 | Phase 0 task |
| Crypto utils (hash/HMAC/signatures) | `@connectsw/shared/utils/crypto` | FR-014 (partial) | Phase 1 security task |
| Prisma client lifecycle plugin | `@connectsw/shared/plugins/prisma` | FR-001 (infra) | Phase 0 task |
| Observability (correlation, health, metrics) | `@connectsw/observability` (`observabilityPlugin`, `healthPlugin`, `metricsPlugin`, `correlationPlugin`) | NFR-005 | Phase 0 task |
| Shared UI primitives (Button, Input, Card, DataTable, DashboardLayout) | `@connectsw/ui` | NFR-008 | Phase 0/1 web tasks |
| RFC 7807 typed error class | `AppError` in `@connectsw/auth` | FR-042 (partial) | Phase 1/4 task |

**Reduced-scope items** (gaps only — base capability imported, only the delta is a task): authentication (`@connectsw/auth` extended with Keycloak OIDC + MFA + 4 channel surfaces — T070..T075); audit (`@connectsw/audit` `AuditLogService`/`createAuditHook`/`AuditLog` extended to the ENT-16 `AuditEvent` model — T053..T058).

---

# PHASE 0 — SETUP & SCAFFOLD

Greenfield product scaffold. No `apps/` exists under `products/credit-os/` yet. All Phase 0 tasks must complete (or their dependency chain) before any Phase 1 module work.

**Shared-file warning**: T002, T003, T010, T014, T021 all touch `products/credit-os/apps/api/package.json` or `apps/web/package.json` — these are **NOT parallel-safe with each other**. T030–T033 all touch `prisma/schema.prisma` — sequence them. Tasks marked `[P]` touch disjoint files only.

## Phase 0.1 — Repo & registry

- [ ] T001 Create product directory skeleton (`apps/api/`, `apps/web/`, `e2e/`, `docs/contracts/`) → products/credit-os/
  - **Agent**: DevOps Engineer · **Depends_on**: — · **Implements**: project structure (plan.md §Project Structure) · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: All directories exist; `git status` shows the new tree; no files outside `products/credit-os/` touched.
- [ ] T002 Register ports 3121 (web) / 5016 (api) in PORT-REGISTRY.md → .claude/PORT-REGISTRY.md
  - **Agent**: DevOps Engineer · **Depends_on**: — · **Implements**: NFR (Article VII), addendum Ports · **Parallel_ok**: yes
  - **Acceptance**: PORT-REGISTRY.md lists `credit-os` web=3121 api=5016; no port collision with existing products.
- [ ] T003 Add `credit-os` entry to PRODUCT-REGISTRY.md (tier, stack, ports, docs links) → .claude/PRODUCT-REGISTRY.md
  - **Agent**: DevOps Engineer · **Depends_on**: — · **Implements**: registry governance · **Parallel_ok**: yes
  - **Acceptance**: PRODUCT-REGISTRY.md row for `credit-os` present with correct ports and doc paths.
- [ ] T004 [P] Confirm Component Registry checked; record reuse decisions stub for new assets → .claude/COMPONENT-REGISTRY.md (note only — full registration in Polish phase)
  - **Agent**: Architect · **Depends_on**: — · **Implements**: Article II compliance · **Parallel_ok**: yes
  - **Acceptance**: COMPONENT-REGISTRY.md reuse check matches plan.md Component Reuse Plan; new-asset placeholders noted.

  - **Agent**: Backend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T011 · **Implements**: plan.md §Project Structure · **Parallel_ok**: no

- [ ] T014 Register shared plugins (Prisma lifecycle, observability, correlation, health, metrics) on the API → products/credit-os/apps/api/src/plugins/index.ts
  - **Agent**: Backend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T013, T030 · **Implements**: NFR-005, FR-001 (infra) · **Parallel_ok**: no

- [ ] T015 Integration test: health + readiness endpoints → products/credit-os/apps/api/tests/integration/health.test.ts
  - **Agent**: QA Engineer · **Depends_on**: T014 · **Implements**: NFR-003 (health), test infra · **Parallel_ok**: no

## Phase 0.3 — Database & Prisma

- [ ] T030 Provision a PostgreSQL 15 dev database + connection config → products/credit-os/apps/api/.env.example
  - **Agent**: Data Engineer · **Depends_on**: T010 · **Implements**: plan.md Technical Context (PostgreSQL 15) · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: `DATABASE_URL` documented; a local `credit_os_dev` database is reachable.
- [ ] T031 Create the initial Prisma schema file + datasource/generator blocks → products/credit-os/apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
  - **Agent**: Data Engineer · **Depends_on**: T030 · **Implements**: FR-001 (storage), ADR-003 · **Parallel_ok**: no (shared schema.prisma)
  - **Acceptance**: `prisma validate` passes; `prisma generate` produces a client.
- [ ] T032 Author the Phase 1 Prisma models — `Product`, `ProductVersion`, `DataElement`, `RuleSet`, `WorkflowDefinition`, `WorkflowStage`, `Transition`, `FormDefinition`, `FormSection`, `FormField`, `DocumentRequirement`, `Connector`, `PublicationBundle`, `RuntimeCase`, `ValidationRun`, `AuditEvent` + `VersionHistory` + `idempotency_keys` — with `tenantId`, `version`, `revision`, `lifecycleStatus` on all versioned entities → products/credit-os/apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
  - **Agent**: Data Engineer · **Depends_on**: T031 · **Implements**: ENT-01..16, FR-001, FR-002, FR-052; data-model.md (plan Phase 1 deliverable) · **Parallel_ok**: no (shared schema.prisma)
  - **Acceptance**: `prisma validate` passes; every entity has `tenantId`; versioned entities have `version` + `revision`; FK constraints match the spec ER diagram.
- [ ] T033 Generate the initial migration + apply it; verify FK constraints → products/credit-os/apps/api/prisma/migrations/
  - **Agent**: Data Engineer · **Depends_on**: T032 · **Implements**: FR-001, FR-052 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: `prisma migrate dev` succeeds; `prisma migrate status` clean; all 19 tables created; rollback path documented.
- [ ] T034 Add the append-only DB grant for `AuditEvent` (revoke UPDATE/DELETE for the app role) → products/credit-os/apps/api/prisma/migrations/ (raw SQL migration)
  - **Agent**: Data Engineer · **Depends_on**: T033 · **Implements**: FR-009 (append-only), NFR-004 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: An UPDATE/DELETE against `audit_event` by the app role is rejected at the DB level; INSERT succeeds.
- [ ] T035 [P] Seed script + sandbox payload catalogue fixtures (realistic stub responses per `capabilityType`) → products/credit-os/apps/api/prisma/seed.ts + apps/api/src/fixtures/sandbox-payloads/
  - **Agent**: Data Engineer · **Depends_on**: T033 · **Implements**: ADR-005, plan.md Phase 0 research item (sandbox catalogue) · **Parallel_ok**: yes
  - **Acceptance**: `prisma db seed` runs; a sandbox payload exists for each of the 10 connector capability types (KYC, AML, sanctions, bureau, registry, open banking, e-sign, DMS, payment, core banking).
- [ ] T036 Document the Keycloak self-hosted setup — OIDC discovery URL, realm, client config, MFA policy → products/credit-os/docs/research.md
  - **Agent**: Security Engineer · **Depends_on**: — · **Implements**: plan.md Phase 0 research item (Keycloak), NFR-002 · **Parallel_ok**: yes
  - **Acceptance**: `docs/research.md` records realm name, OIDC discovery URL, client id, MFA policy; a local Keycloak realm import file exists.

# PHASE 1 — FOUNDATION (EPIC-01..04, US-01..14, FR-001..014, FR-052)

**Goal**: a versioned, tenant-scoped, audited, secured metadata repository — the substrate for every later module.
**Build order** (plan.md): `kernel` versioning repo → `audit` + `data-dictionary` → `auth` surfaces → web foundation.
**Checkpoint**: Orchestrator checkpoint after the Phase 1 Testing Gate passes.

## Phase 1.1 — Shared kernel: versioning base repository (US-02, US-04, FR-002, FR-004, FR-052)

This is the single place BR-01 / BR-08 are enforced — heaviest unit-test coverage.

### Tests First (TDD — Red)
- [ ] T050 Unit tests: versioning base repository — version bump on update, immutability rejection on `PUBLISHED` rows, `revision` optimistic-concurrency 409, `tenantId` scoping forced on every query → products/credit-os/apps/api/tests/unit/kernel/versioned-repository.test.ts
  - **Agent**: QA Engineer · **Depends_on**: T044, T041 · **Implements**: US-02 [AC-1,3], US-04 [AC-1,2], FR-002, FR-004, FR-052 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: Tests written and failing (no implementation yet); cover version N→N+1, in-place edit of `PUBLISHED` rejected, concurrent edit → 409, query without `tenantId` impossible.

### Implementation (TDD — Green)
- [ ] T051 [FR-002][FR-004][FR-052] Implement the generic versioning base repository (create/read/list/update/delete; `tenantId` scoping, `revision` concurrency, integer `version` bump, `PUBLISHED` immutability) → products/credit-os/apps/api/src/kernel/versioned-repository.ts
  - **Agent**: Backend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T050 · **Implements**: US-02, US-04, FR-002, FR-004, FR-052 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: All T050 tests pass; coverage of `versioned-repository.ts` ≥ 95%.
- [ ] T052 [FR-003] Implement version-history read (list all versions with author/timestamp/status; read a historical version read-only) → products/credit-os/apps/api/src/kernel/version-history.ts
  - **Agent**: Backend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T051 · **Implements**: US-03, FR-003 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: Given an object with 3 versions, history returns all 3 newest-first with metadata; a selected version returns a read-only snapshot.

## Phase 1.2 — `audit` module (US-09, US-10, FR-009, FR-010) — built early per RSK-08

### Tests First (TDD — Red)
- [ ] T053 [P] Unit tests: `AuditEvent` builder — actor/action/objectRef/before/after/correlationId/timestamp; append-only invariant → products/credit-os/apps/api/tests/unit/modules/audit/audit-event.test.ts
  - **Agent**: QA Engineer · **Depends_on**: T041, T032 · **Implements**: US-09 [AC-1,3], FR-009 · **Parallel_ok**: yes
  - **Acceptance**: Tests written and failing; cover full event shape + the rejection of update/delete through the service.
- [ ] T054 Integration test: an `AuditEvent` is written on every create/update/publish/approve/release/rollback, and on a failed action → products/credit-os/apps/api/tests/integration/modules/audit/audit-hook.test.ts
  - **Agent**: QA Engineer · **Depends_on**: T041, T033 · **Implements**: US-09 [AC-1,2], FR-009 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: Tests written and failing against a real DB.
- [ ] T055 Integration test: audit query by object id, by actor + time range, and by runtime case → products/credit-os/apps/api/tests/integration/modules/audit/audit-query.test.ts
  - **Agent**: QA Engineer · **Depends_on**: T041, T033 · **Implements**: US-10, FR-010 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: Tests written and failing.

### Implementation (TDD — Green)
- [ ] T056 [FR-009] Implement the `audit` module — extend `@connectsw/audit` `AuditLogService` to the ENT-16 `AuditEvent` model (before/after, objectRef, correlationId) → products/credit-os/apps/api/src/modules/audit/service.ts
  - **Agent**: Backend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T053 · **Implements**: US-09, FR-009 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: T053 tests pass.
- [ ] T057 [FR-009] Wire an `onResponse` hook + kernel event-bus subscriptions so every material action writes an `AuditEvent` → products/credit-os/apps/api/src/modules/audit/audit-hook.ts
  - **Agent**: Backend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T056, T044 · **Implements**: US-09, FR-009, NFR-004 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: T054 tests pass; failed actions also produce an event.
- [ ] T058 [FR-010] Implement the audit query API (`GET /api/v1/audit` — filter by object/actor/action/time, bounded pagination) → products/credit-os/apps/api/src/modules/audit/routes.ts
  - **Agent**: Backend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T056 · **Implements**: US-10, FR-010 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: T055 tests pass; results newest-first; pagination bounded.

  - **Agent**: QA Engineer · **Depends_on**: T041, T033 · **Implements**: US-05, US-07, FR-005, FR-007 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: Tests written and failing.

  - **Agent**: Backend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T060, T061, T062, T051 · **Implements**: US-05, FR-005 · **Parallel_ok**: no

  - **Agent**: Backend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T063 · **Implements**: US-06, FR-006 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: T060 tests pass; intentional override recorded on the element.
- [ ] T065 [FR-007] Implement reference tracking (list objects referencing an element) + dictionary search API (`GET /api/v1/data-elements`) → products/credit-os/apps/api/src/modules/data-dictionary/routes.ts
  - **Agent**: Backend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T063 · **Implements**: US-07, FR-007, API-06..08 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: T062 search assertions pass; referencing objects listed.
- [ ] T066 [FR-008] Implement lifecycle-status management + gating (versioned + audited; `DEPRECATED` warn, `RETIRED` block bindings) → products/credit-os/apps/api/src/modules/data-dictionary/lifecycle.ts
  - **Agent**: Backend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T063, T064 · **Implements**: US-08, FR-008 · **Parallel_ok**: no

## Phase 1.4 — `auth` surfaces & security (US-11..14, FR-011..014) — depends on kernel + audit

### Tests First (TDD — Red)
- [ ] T070 Integration test: RBAC — an author role attempting an approve action → 403 + audited denial; an approver role → success → products/credit-os/apps/api/tests/integration/auth/rbac.test.ts
  - **Agent**: QA Engineer · **Depends_on**: T041, T057 · **Implements**: US-11, FR-011 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: Tests written and failing.
- [ ] T071 Integration test: domain ownership routing — object pending approval routes to the domain's assigned approver; no-approver domain blocks publication → products/credit-os/apps/api/tests/integration/auth/domain-ownership.test.ts
  - **Agent**: QA Engineer · **Depends_on**: T041, T033 · **Implements**: US-13, FR-013 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: Tests written and failing.

### Implementation (TDD — Green)
- [ ] T072 [FR-012] Integrate Keycloak OIDC + MFA enforcement (extend `@connectsw/auth`; OIDC token w/ role claims; second factor required) → products/credit-os/apps/api/src/plugins/auth-oidc.ts
  - **Agent**: Security Engineer · **Depends_on**: T036, T013 · **Implements**: US-12, FR-012, NFR-002 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: Login requires a second factor before a session; failed second factor denied + audited; session is an OIDC token with role claims.
- [ ] T073 [FR-011] Implement the four channel auth-surface plugin scopes (internal web + MFA, branch + MFA, partner client-credentials + API key, hardened customer self-service) + RBAC preHandler on every route → products/credit-os/apps/api/src/plugins/auth-surfaces.ts
  - **Agent**: Security Engineer · **Depends_on**: T072 · **Implements**: US-11, FR-011, ADR-006, NFR-002 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: T070 tests pass; each surface enforces its trust level; rate limiting strict on the customer surface + auth endpoints.
- [ ] T074 [FR-013] Implement the domain ownership model (owner/approver/consumer per domain; versioned; approval routing) → products/credit-os/apps/api/src/modules/policy/domain-ownership.ts
  - **Agent**: Backend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T071, T051 · **Implements**: US-13, FR-013 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: T071 tests pass; assignment persisted + versioned; missing-approver domain blocks publication with a config error.
- [ ] T075 [FR-014] Implement vault-backed secrets handling — connector credentials via `authRef`, never plaintext, never API-returned; encryption-at-rest config; secret access audited → products/credit-os/apps/api/src/plugins/secrets.ts
  - **Agent**: Security Engineer · **Depends_on**: T072, T057 · **Implements**: US-14, FR-014, NFR-002 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: A credential request returns only a reference; TLS enforced; secret access writes an `AuditEvent`.

# PHASE 2 — INTEGRITY ENGINE (EPIC-05, US-15..20, FR-015..020)

**Goal**: a dependency-graph engine that validates cross-object integrity and blocks publication of inconsistent configuration. Highest-risk component (RSK-01).
**Decomposition note**: story-level; re-decompose with `/speckit.tasks` before implementation. Each of the 8 validation stages should become its own task per plan.md "8 validation stages as separate, independently testable validators".

- [ ] T100 [US-15][FR-015] Build the `integrity` module + dependency-graph builder (transitive-closure read; nodes = config objects, edges = 11 FRD-21 relationship types; cycle detection) → apps/api/src/modules/integrity/graph-builder.ts
  - **Agent**: Backend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T088 · **Implements**: US-15, FR-015 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: Graph contains all nodes/edges for a known fixture; dangling references + cycles recorded as defects; tests-first (TDD).
- [ ] T101 [US-16][FR-016] Implement the 8 validation stages as independent validators (Schema → Referential → Business consistency → Dependency completeness → Version compatibility → Connector readiness → Channel compatibility → Release readiness), tested against the FRD-21 validation matrix → apps/api/src/modules/integrity/stages/
  - **Agent**: Backend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T100 · **Implements**: US-16, FR-016 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: Each of the 11 relationships has passing/broken/missing-edge tests; each FRD-23 blocking condition has a test.
- [ ] T102 [US-17][US-18][US-20][FR-017][FR-018][FR-020] Implement defect classification + blocking (`PASS`/`PASS_WITH_WARNINGS`/`FAIL`; any CRITICAL → FAIL with no override; warnings require recorded approval; acknowledgement invalidated on config change) → apps/api/src/modules/integrity/classifier.ts
  - **Agent**: Backend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T101 · **Implements**: US-17, US-18, US-20, FR-017, FR-018, FR-020 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: FAIL has no override path; `PASS_WITH_WARNINGS` requires explicit recorded acknowledgement.
- [ ] T103 [US-19][FR-019] Implement `ValidationRun` persistence + the integrity APIs (API-22 run, API-23 get report) + `AuditEvent` + `notification` alert on FAIL → apps/api/src/modules/integrity/routes.ts
  - **Agent**: Backend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T102 · **Implements**: US-19, FR-019, NFR-004, NFR-005 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: A run returns a run id; the report lists status + every check + every defect; `ValidationRun` persisted; FAIL emits an alert.
- [ ] T104 [US-19] Implement the web `/integrity` (runs list + on-demand trigger) and `/integrity/[runId]` (defect report) → apps/web/src/app/integrity/
  - **Agent**: Frontend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T103 · **Implements**: US-15..20 surfaces · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: Trigger a run, see PASS/FAIL; defect report renders with object references.
- [ ] T105 E2E + Phase 2 checkpoint — run on `/integrity` → PASS; introduce an unmapped mandatory field → re-run → FAIL with the defect; confirm publication is blocked; run `/speckit.analyze` + Testing Gate → e2e/tests/integrity/ + docs/quality-reports/
  - **Agent**: QA Engineer · **Depends_on**: T104 · **Implements**: plan.md Phase 2 exit criteria, Article X · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: All gates PASS; Orchestrator checkpoint reached.

# PHASE 3 — AUTHORING STUDIOS (EPIC-06..10, US-21..39, FR-021..034)

**Decomposition note**: epic-level. Re-decompose each studio with `/speckit.tasks` before implementation. Each studio's authored objects replace the Phase 2 integrity fixtures.
**Build order** (plan.md): `product` → `policy` → `workflow` → `form` → `document`.

- [ ] T120 [EPIC-06][FR-021][FR-022] Product Studio — `Product`/`ProductVersion`; create/clone/version/retire; template inheritance via `baseTemplateId`; APIs API-01..05; web `/products` + `/products/[id]`
  - **Agent**: Backend + Frontend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T105 · **Implements**: US-21, US-22, US-23, US-24, FR-021, FR-022 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: Per-story acceptance criteria (spec US-21..24); integrity engine validates authored products.
- [ ] T121 [EPIC-07][FR-023..026] Policy & Decision Studio — `RuleSet` + the RuleSet metadata layer wrapping `json-rules-engine` (ADR-002); condition-group authoring, simulation (API-10), reuse, dictionary validation (API-11); APIs API-09..11; web `/policies` + `/policies/[id]`
  - **Agent**: Backend + Frontend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T120 · **Implements**: US-25, US-26, US-27, US-28, FR-023, FR-024, FR-025, FR-026 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: Per-story acceptance criteria (spec US-25..28); simulation has no runtime effect; rule inputs validated against the dictionary.
- [ ] T122 [EPIC-08][FR-027][FR-028] Workflow Studio — `WorkflowDefinition`/`Stage`/`Transition`; stages, transitions, approvals/SLAs/exception paths, parallel/sequential steps; transition-validity check; APIs API-12..14; web `/workflows` + `/workflows/[id]`
  - **Agent**: Backend + Frontend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T121 · **Implements**: US-29, US-30, US-31, US-32, FR-027, FR-028 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: Per-story acceptance criteria (spec US-29..32); a transition with no condition + no default is rejected; orphaned stage flagged.
- [ ] T123 [EPIC-09][FR-029..032] Form Studio — `FormDefinition`/`Section`/`Field`; dynamic form builder; every field maps to a Data Element (BR-03, DB NOT NULL); conditional behaviour; the dynamic Form renderer for channel/product/stage preview (API-16); APIs API-15..16; web `/forms` + `/forms/[id]`
  - **Agent**: Backend + Frontend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T122 · **Implements**: US-33, US-34, US-35, US-36, FR-029, FR-030, FR-031, FR-032 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: Per-story acceptance criteria (spec US-33..36); an unmapped field is rejected; preview has no published-config effect.
- [ ] T124 [EPIC-10][FR-033][FR-034] Document Studio — typed `DocumentRequirement` (mandatory/conditional/generated/uploaded/signed); linking to products/stages/rules; missing-doc flagging; APIs API-17..18; web `/documents` + `/documents/[id]`
  - **Agent**: Backend + Frontend Engineer · **Depends_on**: T123 · **Implements**: US-37, US-38, US-39, FR-033, FR-034 · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: Per-story acceptance criteria (spec US-37..39); orphaned requirement flagged by integrity.
- [ ] T125 Phase 3 checkpoint — `/speckit.analyze` + Testing Gate + Browser-First Gate → docs/quality-reports/
  - **Agent**: QA Engineer · **Depends_on**: T124 · **Implements**: Article X · **Parallel_ok**: no
  - **Acceptance**: All gates PASS; Orchestrator checkpoint reached.

## Execution Strategy

- **MVP-first**: Phase 0 + Phase 1 deliver the metadata-repository foundation — the first demonstrable increment (a versioned, audited, secured Data Dictionary).
- **Incremental**: Phases 2→5 add the Integrity Engine, Studios, Services/Integration, and Publication/Runtime. Each ends at an Orchestrator checkpoint after a Testing Gate PASS.
- **Parallel within Phase 0**: T012/T022/T035/T040/T041/T042/T044 are `[P]` (disjoint files). `package.json` and `prisma/schema.prisma` tasks are strictly sequenced.
- **Parallel within Phase 1**: the `audit` module (T053..T058) and the `data-dictionary` module (T060..T066) are independent leaf modules — runnable in parallel via git worktrees. The web pages T081..T085 are `[P]` after T080. T050/T051/T052 (kernel) block both module trees.
- **Phases 2–5**: coarse tasks — re-run `/speckit.tasks` to decompose each phase before implementation.

## Parallel Execution Opportunities

| Phase | Parallel-safe set | Shared-file conflict (sequence these) |
|-------|-------------------|----------------------------------------|
| 0 | T012, T022, T035, T036, T040, T041, T042, T044 | `package.json`: T010→T012, T020→T022 · `schema.prisma`: T031→T032→T033→T034 |
| 1 | `audit` tree (T053–T058) ∥ `data-dictionary` tree (T060–T066) ∥ T076 · web T081–T085 after T080 | T050→T051→T052 kernel chain blocks both module trees |
| 2–5 | Backend ∥ Frontend per task via git worktrees | One Prisma schema per phase — sequence schema edits |

## Suggested Next Step

`/speckit.analyze` — Specification Consistency Gate (run before the Architecture checkpoint). Report: `docs/quality-reports/speckit-analyze.md`.
